title: pedicularis microphylla
intro: Pedicularis microphylla, also known as small-flowered lousewort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pedicularis microphylla include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied and confirmed.
